description_long: This is a classic single-propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage and elliptical wings, reminiscent of World War II fighter aircraft. The body is primarily painted white with black accents and features insignia and markings, including a United States flag and roundel on the wings and fuselage. The propeller is mounted at the nose and has a wooden appearance, while the cockpit is enclosed with a green-tinted canopy situated just behind the propeller. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a conventional tail design. The landing gear is visible and appears to be a taildragger configuration, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel.
description: A vintage-style, single-propeller airplane with elliptical wings, white and black paint, and classic military markings. It features an enclosed cockpit, conventional tail, and taildragger landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the elliptical wingspan, central propeller, and the green-tinted cockpit canopy behind the nose.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the fuselage markings, propeller, and the main landing gear under the wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the opposite wing's insignia, cockpit placement, and taildragger landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight elliptical wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a four-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed gear under the wings and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy integrated into the fuselage.
